title: End Void Entities to Spawn
description: Entities that enter The End Void are teleported to spawn
body:
Entities that enter the end void are teleported to the overworld. This includes players, items and mobs. 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CxW2zpGZ-6o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Version 1 bug - please update to 1.1!
**Version 1 has a bug where entities from all dimensions are teleported to spawn, 1.1 fixes this**

## Entities that are not teleported:
- Enderpearl items
- Endermen
- Wither Skulls

## What if I want all entities to be teleported to spawn?
There is another version of this datapack [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/all-end-void-entities-to-spawn). This will teleport all entities to spawn , so your endermen, enderpearls and wither skulls will appear in the overworld like any other entity. 

## Where in the overworld are they teleported to?
The default is 0, 0, 0 but [this video](https://youtu.be/GmScgdOjm-M) will show you how to change that.

## Does it work on a server? 
Yes, the server I play on has had this running for months without a problem.

## Is it reliable?
Yes, the server I play on has had this running for months without a problem.

## How it works:
Entities that have a y-level less than -60 in the end are teleported to the overworld.

# Problem? - BobuarThereIsSomethingWrongWithYourThing@outlook.com
